title: edikt artifact sidecar
description: The <artifact>.edikt.yaml sidecar file co-located next to an ADR, invariant, or guideline. Replaces the in-body [edikt:directives:start]/[edikt:directives:end] sentinel block per ADR-027 (sidecar architecture, v0.6.0). Compile reads sidecars verbatim and never mutates the parent .md.

schema_version.description: Sidecar schema version. The directive sidecar uses a discrete integer (1) because its on-disk shape is a v1-or-v2 contract, not a semver-versioned one — bump only when the on-disk shape changes in a way that older readers cannot interpret. PRD/SPEC sidecars (prd-sidecar.v1.schema.json, spec-sidecar.v1.schema.json) deliberately use a string semver ("1.0") for additive evolution within v1.x; the asymmetry is intentional. v0.6.0 ships with version 1.

topic.description: Kebab-case topic identifier used to group directives across artifacts during compile. 1–40 characters, must start with a lowercase letter, may contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

path.description: Relative path (from the project root) to the parent .md artifact this sidecar describes. Validated by /edikt:doctor — a sidecar whose path doesn't resolve is reported as orphaned.

items.description: Lowercase signal phrase. Used by the routing table in compiled governance to surface this directive set when a task matches the signal.

signals.description: Lowercase, deduplicated keyword/phrase signals that route work to this artifact.

text.description: The directive sentence as it will appear in compiled governance, ≤ 200 characters. Includes its own ref tail (e.g., '(ref: ADR-018)').

line_start.description: 1-indexed line number in the parent .md where the directive's source text begins.

line_end.description: 1-indexed line number where the source text ends. Must be ≥ line_start. /edikt:doctor verifies this is within the parent file's line count.

quote.description: Verbatim text from the parent .md between line_start and line_end. Used by /edikt:doctor for drift detection (resync triggers when the live quote no longer matches the recorded quote).

directives.description: Directive list extracted from the parent .md. May be empty (an artifact with no enforceable directives is reported by /edikt:doctor as a warning, not an error). Note: line_end ≥ line_start and line_end ≤ parent_file_line_count are enforced by /edikt:doctor and the compile resync pass — JSON Schema 2020-12 has no standard cross-property comparator.
